title: cassine pubescens
intro: Cassine pubescens, also known as Wild Coffee or Cassine, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Cassine pubescens has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cassine pubescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
